data.text:
Committed. Summary of changes:

- Added `website/static/demos/08-helix-quickstart.cast` — 72s asciinema v2 cast (100×28) covering `ddx init`, `ddx install helix`, three `ddx bead create` invocations, then `ddx work` draining the queue with realistic claude harness dispatch output.
- Updated `website/layouts/index.html` player `data-src` to reference the new cast.
- Archived the prior `07-quickstart.cast` to `website/static/demos/archive/`.
